# NCUpdateResult.noData

**Case**

The update did not result in any new data since the last update.

## Declaration

```swift
case noData
```

## Constants

- **NCUpdateResult.newData**: The update resulted in new data to display.
- **NCUpdateResult.failed**: The update attempt failed.
